_readme: ERA OVERRIDES — rail (ทางราง). Merged onto template_rail_v2.json by merge script (to be written in E2/E-data session).
One entry per leaf whose measurement VALUES vary by law era. Item-level applicability is NOT handled here (that is lawRefs filtering).
Format: leafCode -> { measurements: [ ... ] } — REPLACES that leaf's measurements array entirely on merge.
This file is a FORMAT REFERENCE with one real example. The full set will be regenerated from Krichpetch's manual year-variance summary file.
All values carry confirmed:false until threshold review; 2564 tier table below is PLACEHOLDER — source table was garbled, needs verification against the paper form.

_schema.tiered: auditor inputs `basis` and `provided`; pass = provided >= tier lookup on basis. Tier: {min, max?, required, incrementPer?, incrementBy?} — incrementPer/By extend the top tier open-endedly.
_schema.byLaw: keys are LawReference codes (MHT_2548, MHT_2564, PSD_2555, MOT_2556, PROJECT). Resolution picks the latest law with effectiveYear <= station.yearBuilt. May wrap any operator's value fields.

A1.1-1.labelHint: กำหนดให้มีที่จอดรถสำหรับคนพิการ ดังนี้
